user.title: Danelfin
user.description: Select which Top 5 recommendation lists to track. You can change this at any time via the integration options. Leave all unchecked to only track individual tickers.

add_ticker.title: Add ticker
add_ticker.description: Enter a ticker symbol and select the market type. Use US symbols for US stocks and RIC-style symbols for European stocks, e.g. SAN.MC, ADS.DE, or VOW.DE.

data_description.ticker: Exchange symbol, e.g. NVDA (US), SAN.MC (EU), BUG (ETF)

abort.already_configured: This ticker is already being tracked.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check your Danelfin API key.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Danelfin API. Check your network connection and API key.
error.ticker_empty: Please enter a ticker symbol (e.g. NVDA, SAN.MC, BUG).
error.ticker_invalid: Invalid ticker symbol. Use letters, digits and dots, e.g. NVDA, SAN.MC, BRK.B (max 12 characters).

init.title: Danelfin Recommendations
init.description: Enable or disable the Top 5 recommendation sensors and adjust the update interval. Changes take effect immediately without restarting HA.

abort.no_options: No configurable options for this entry.
